name: Incident Response Policy
description: All security incidents must be classified, tracked, and resolved within defined SLAs. Critical incidents require immediate escalation to SOC management.

name: Access Control Policy
description: Network access must follow least-privilege principles. All administrative access requires MFA and is logged centrally.

name: Logging and Monitoring Policy
description: All network traffic, system events, and access logs must be collected, retained for 90 days, and monitored for suspicious activity.
